details.test: Task 1: Shortlist cheapest 10-week beginner incubator starting June under $500
Task 2: Complete application for an online evening programme with tuition under $800
Task 3: Create learning plan with marketing and finance courses (plus pitching if available)
Task 4: Register for a free webinar and a paid event under $50
Task 5: Book lowest-cost 30-minute fintech mentor session at 3:00 PM next available Tuesday
Task 6: Use budget calculator with three monthly expenses under $1,500 total
Task 7: Bookmark funding and MVP validation articles to reading list
Task 8: Compare funding tracks and save preferred one to funding interest list
Task 9: Complete readiness quiz and add first recommended course to learning plan
